name: lodestar
description: Completeness-first UX-first AI development delegation harness.

interface.longDescription: Lodestar is a completeness-first UX-first AI development delegation harness. Your intent is the guiding star: it combines 20 first-class Lodestar skills with vendored Spec Kit, Superpowers, Compound Engineering, and gstack reference contracts so agents can clarify product intent, approve product shape, lock specs, execute with worktrees, review with proof, debrief repeated failures, and hand off only after all flight gates pass.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Lodestar to clarify my product intent, show me the product shape first, lock the approved spec, and execute it through a gated long-horizon agent workflow.
